Our Manifesto

Matrimony is not an interface for swiping.

We believe that serious life partner searches should be built around family values, verified identities, and absolute respect. We remove noise and focus entirely on the quiet, serious process of marriage matchmaking.

Human-Led Standard

The Matchmaking Council. No algorithms dictate your fate.

We reject superficial matching scripts. Every candidate proposal undergoes an audit check by our council of experts before connection begins.

100%Manual Audit
15 MinAudit Time
01

Identity CNIC Audit Checks

Our specialists check CNIC registrations and match selfies manually to confirm zero profile duplication.

02

Matrimonial Intent Assessment

We contact candidate profile creators to verify intention level (independent vs parental involvement).

03

Criteria Compatibility Search

Our dashboard processes family requirements: education background, city locations, and cast/sect parameters.

04

Respectful Mutual Introduction

We establish a secure introductory chat channel, locking photo visibility until candidate consents are granted.

Platform Architecture

Timeless design, built for serious intent.

Identity

Manual CNIC Auditing

We verify Government CNICs alongside live selfie captures to eliminate fake profiles before they can browse matches.

Privacy

Complete Photo Shields

Photos stay hidden under blur controls until you explicitly approve match request permissions.

Discovery

Intent-Based Filters

Filter profiles by city, age, sect, marital status, and family background expectations with complete clarity.

Messaging

Matrimonial Connection Rules

Direct messaging requires mutual consent. Free members can send one initial request invitation.

Payments

Transparent Payment Rails

All subscriptions, invoices, and refund policies follow strict payment gateway audit guidelines.

Operations

Guided Activity States

Verification updates, lock permissions, and chat request statuses are grouped into calm, readable boards.

matrimonial charter
“We do not build dating swipe lists.
We craft serious family connections.”

Privacy PolicyTerms & ConditionsRefund PolicyContact Us

Platform trust is not an aesthetic garnish. It is a quiet matrimonial commitment.

We manually review CNIC credentials, lock photo displays by default, and structure messaging options to keep matrimonial intention serious. We treat matchmaking with the respect your family deserves.

SP
Matrimonial Verification CouncilShadii.pk Standards

CNIC Audit Controls

Every profile undergoes government identity checks before approval.

First-Message Rules

Introduction invites block match spammers from accessing matches.

Gateway Compliant Rails

All policies and subscriptions follow rapid compliance rules.

Clarifications

Common questions, clear policies.

We details all rules regarding identity audits, subscription packages, and photo locks clearly.

How does Shadii.pk verify profile authenticity?+

Every member must upload their government-issued CNIC alongside a live capture selfie. Our safety team manually reviews and approves each match card before the profile is active.

Are my photos completely private?+

Yes. By default, photos are kept under a blurred lock mask. Other members can request access, and your images are only visible once you explicitly approve their request.

What is the single-message chat rule?+

To prevent spam, free users can send one introduction message. Once the recipient accepts and replies, the conversation can be unlocked permanently through an active subscription tier.
